TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_knuring, title = knuring, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/knuring} }

S.FORM: knurling inblequn smi' qu knuring lga, iyat pzywi' qu ngasal la.
knurling inblequn smi' qu knuring lga, iyat pzywi' qu ngasal la.
S.PHON: knurliŋ inβlequn s~ɕmiʔ qu knuriŋ lɣa, ijat pzjwiʔ qu ŋas~ɕal la.
